_comment: Curated list of known venues. Each dataset's `Venue Title`/`Venue Name` is matched against `title`, `name`, and `aliases` (case/punctuation-insensitive). Add new venues or aliases here, then re-run `python3 quality_assurance.py --check venue`. Matching ignores case, punctuation, a leading 'The', and treats '&' as 'and', so you only need to list genuinely different wordings/acronyms/typos as aliases.
